candidates.why: Balance sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents available in the statements.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet cash line as preferred source for CHE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Incorrect maturity bucket.

This appears twice on the balance sheet; the smaller/upper occurrence is likely current borrowings, while the larger/lower occurrence is non-current borrowings. Best available non-lease short-term debt label.
Semantically a good candidate for current portion of long-term debt, but values are blank in preview and may not be populated.
Cash flow financing movement, not a balance sheet stock of short-term debt.

variables.notes: R:nc. Chose 'Debt to credit institutions' as the best available current debt line and excluded lease liabilities. Manual review because the same label appears in both current and non-current sections, creating some ambiguity across years.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Cash flow sheet candidate is not the preferred sheet and appears blank in preview.

variables.notes: Selected explicit balance sheet taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Exact match for net PPE; preferred over gross or depreciation component lines.
Gross PP&E-style label, but not preferred when a cleaner net PPE line exists.
Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

Cash flow investing item, not a balance sheet stock.
